info.name: Outlook Mock API
info.description: Test collection for the mock Outlook (Microsoft Graph v1.0 mail/calendar) API service (messages, sendMail, events, contacts). Base URL defaults to http://localhost:8087. In docker-compose, the service is reachable at http://outlook-api:8087. Graph collections are wrapped as {"value": [...]}.

body.raw: {"message": {"subject": "Project kickoff", "body": {"contentType": "HTML", "content": "Let us sync on Monday to kick things off."}, "toRecipients": [{"emailAddress": {"address": "priya.nair@contoso.com"}}]}}
